text:
Beyond the colosseum, the Shadow Realm narrows. The amber plains give way to something more deliberate — pathways of black stone, lined with monuments to things that never happened. A victory celebration for a battle that was lost. A coronation for a king who was never crowned. A funeral for someone who is still alive.

You follow the path of black stone. It is the only thing here that knows where it is going.
lore: The monuments of the Shadow Realm are not memorials. They are corrections — the world documenting, in stone, everything that should have happened and didn't. The realm takes its archival duties very seriously.
